name: Basic Sugarless Vegetarian Mincemeat
recipeInstructions:
1. Quarter and core apples; do not peel.
2. Grind in an old-fashioned meat grinder or food processor on medium-coarse setting. Avoid grinding too fine.
3. Remove seeds from lemon and orange; grind with the apple mixture.
4. Grind 1 cup of raisins separately.
5. Mix all ingredients except rum flavoring in a large bowl, stirring in spices, flour, and date sugar (if using).
6. Add rum flavoring and mix again.
7. Cover the bowl or container tightly and refrigerate for at least one week before using or canning. For pints, use a boiling water bath for 20 minutes after the water returns to boil; adjust time for altitudes over 1000 ft.
8. If any jars do not seal, freeze the contents in clean freezer containers or jars with tight lids until ready to use.
9. To freeze after refrigeration: Leave 1/2 inch of headspace and place in the freezer's cold section until frozen solid.
10. Thaw overnight in the refrigerator before using.
Makes 1 quart, enough for 2 8-inch pies.
Nutrition: 116 calories, 2 diabetic fruit exchanges; Protein 1, Fat 0, Carbohydrate 28 grams, Cholesterol 0 (Salt omitted: 7 mg Sodium).
